Localization.Description: A user added or removed an Active Directory server from a synchronization list, or a user added or changed a parameter value of an AD server from a synchronization list

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} removed the Active Directory server "{object.name}" from a synchronization list on host {event_src.host}

The user {subject.account.name} changed the parameter value "{object.property}" of the Active Directory server "{object.name}" from a synchronization list from "{object.value}" to "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} added the Active Directory server "{object.name}" to a synchronization list on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} added the parameter "{object.property}" of the Active Directory server "{object.name}" from a synchronization list on host {event_src.host}
